name: Save The Prince
description: Save The Prince is a free puzzle online game for boys. The prince is trapped in the room. In the game, you need to constantly move different rooms to help the princess reach the prince.As long as you can discover the cleverness of the organs, it may take only one step to save the trapped prince. The levels have different scenes, and there are lots of skins waiting for you to explore. Have fun!
tags: 3D, Android, Animal, Avoid, Boy, Brain, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Obstacle, Online, Princess, Puzzle, Rescue
